# qrcode-generator

This directory vendors `qrcode-generator` for offline QR code generation on the Screen view.

- Package: `qrcode-generator`
- Version: `1.4.4`
- Author: Kazuhiko Arase
- License: MIT
- npm package: `qrcode-generator@1.4.4`
- Repository: `https://github.com/kazuhikoarase/qrcode-generator`

The game uses this bundled copy instead of a CDN so the venue screen can render the join URL QR code without network access beyond the app itself.
